hba6a3d93g505bg44e5g831dgc3d8d569a88d: That insect's gonna keep shoving his ugly face in our business.

h313ed804g0788g4ea0gb2dcg340b9ebfe34b: A shame about the eye. Just tell folks it's a battle wound. Trust me - they'll eat it right up.
